-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

The provided patch does not patch cleanly

|diff -ruN /usr/ports/science/afni/pkg-plist afni-latest/pkg-plist
|--- /usr/ports/science/afni/pkg-plist  Sat Apr 21 08:37:39 2007
|+++ afni-latest/pkg-plist      Wed Jan  2 11:13:02 2008
- --------------------------
Patching file pkg-plist using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
Hunk #2 succeeded at 39.
Hunk #3 succeeded at 60.
Hunk #4 failed at 72.
Hunk #5 succeeded at 92 (offset 1 line).
Hunk #6 succeeded at 138 (offset 1 line).
Hunk #7 succeeded at 152 (offset 1 line).
Hunk #8 succeeded at 165 (offset 1 line).
Hunk #9 succeeded at 180 (offset 1 line).
Hunk #10 succeeded at 210 (offset 1 line).
Hunk #11 failed at 222.
Hunk #12 succeeded at 262 (offset 1 line).
Hunk #13 failed at 296.
Hunk #14 succeeded at 321 (offset -1 lines).
Hunk #15 succeeded at 345 (offset 1 line).
Hunk #16 succeeded at 360 (offset -1 lines).
Hunk #17 succeeded at 408 (offset 1 line).
Hunk #18 failed at 419.
Hunk #19 failed at 435.
Hunk #20 succeeded at 475 (offset 1 line).
Hunk #21 failed at 489.
Hunk #22 succeeded at 521 (offset 2 lines).
Hunk #23 succeeded at 537 (offset 1 line).
Hunk #24 succeeded at 571 (offset 2 lines).
Hunk #25 succeeded at 590 (offset 1 line).
6 out of 25 hunks failed--saving rejects to pkg-plist.rej

Can you please investigate and re-submit?

Thanks.


Thomas
